name: Simon of Cyrene
oracleText:
When Simon of Cyrene enters the battlefield, another target creature you control gains indestructible until end of turn.
Whenever another creature you control attacks alone, Simon gets +1/+1 until end of turn.
flavorText: "They laid the cross on him, that he might bear it after Jesus." — Luke 23:26
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics, mana, colors, and stats added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses Theophile Marie Francois Lybaert's "Simon of Cyrene Carries the Cross" via Wikimedia Commons.
title: Bearer of the Cross

classics.license: Public domain; Wikimedia Commons hosts a faithful reproduction of a public-domain work.
classics.creditText: Theophile Marie Francois Lybaert, Simon of Cyrene Carries the Cross
classics.sourceNotes: This is a direct subject match for Simon’s burden-bearing role.
